response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, and teaching. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry infrastructure, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this IC6 Principal role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and breadth suggest capability, but lack of platform-scale experimentation work and no clear evidence of Principal-level cross-team systemic impact make this a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe relevant depth.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with 15+ years across web, backend, mobile, and embedded
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD
Experience with high-throughput systems (Sociomantic: millions of HTTP req/sec, low-latency services)
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth platform experience
No evidence of building measurement/telemetry platforms used across multiple teams
Title is Staff, not Principal — unclear if scope of influence matches IC6 cross-org expectations

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
High-scale low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic
